message:
feat(http/h2): HPACK Huffman encoding per RFC 7541 Appendix B

- Add encode_huffman() function: variable-length Huffman code packing
  with EOS-padded final byte per Section 5.2
- Update encode_string() to use Huffman encoding when use_huffman=true,
  setting 0x80 flag in length prefix
- 4 new tests: encode/decode roundtrip, compression ratio verification,
  string encoding with Huffman flag, full encoder/decoder roundtrip

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
